definitions: n. 厄运；毁灭（在此语境下的释义）

examples.text:
In many ways the vibe is that we live 
in dark times. It is so easy to feel disconnected and powerless in the face of 
problems too big to solve. And so the state of the world fills many of us with doom, 
hopelessness and sadness. We feel it too. It is one of the most pervasive stories of 
our time and there is a lot of truth to it. But as Terry Pratchett said, we are the 
storytelling ape, we think in narratives
examples.explanation: n. 厄运；毁灭（在此语境下的释义）

reviewSessions.example_text: In many ways the vibe is that we live in dark times. It is so easy to feel disconnected and powerless in the face of problems too big to solve. And so the state of the world fills many of us with doom, hopelessness and sadness. We feel it too. It is one of the most pervasive stories of our time and there is a lot of truth to it. But as Terry Pratchett said, we are the storytelling ape, we think in narratives
expected_definitions: n. 厄运；毁灭（在此语境下的释义）
matched_points: 准确回忆出目标词 doom

relations.reason: doom 表示“厄运；毁灭”，与 fatal 的“致命的；灾难性的”都涉及死亡、毁灭、严重结局这一核心语义场。词性和具体用法不同，不宜强行判为近义词，但作为语义相关词有学习价值。
